metadata.milestone: EA-2 Correction: Assistant Orchestrator + Semantic Router Audit

service.name: assistant_orchestrator
service.production_files: circuit_breaker.py, constants.py, context_manager.py, entrypoint.py, gpu_inference.py, pgov.py

work_items_completed.item: Full re-read of all 15 in-scope source/test files. Key findings confirmed against old EA-2 branch content.
Header normalized from PA-only format to multi-EA format with EA index table (EA-1, EA-1 Correction, EA-2).
AO coverage findings appended: 6 modules assessed, 19 gaps documented. Critical: entrypoint.py config validation 13/15 constraints untested (HIGH).
SR coverage findings appended: 3 modules assessed, 8 gaps documented. Dual-gate boundaries untested (MEDIUM).
Reclassified PGOV 0.85 threshold (Boundary → AO Coverage Map) and SR dual-gate boundaries (Boundary → SR Coverage Map) per TEST_GOVERNANCE.md §boundary-rule.
Boundary Violations section rewritten: PA (no violations), AO (cross-service import — test_entrypoint.py line 17 imports PA jwt_minter), SR (no violations).
Obsolete §-references check: N/A — no stale cross-references found (EA-1 correction already cleaned these).
Staged exactly 2 docs files (explicit git add, no git add .). Committed as f25e170.

files_changed.file: Multi-EA header, AO+SR findings appended across all 4 populated sections, reclassifications applied

finding_category.critical: entrypoint.py: 13 of 15 TOML config validation constraints untested (HIGH)
finding_category.notable: constants.py: UNCOVERED — no dedicated test file, value regressions undetectable
PGOV 0.85 exact threshold untested (reclassified from boundary to coverage)
constants.py: UNCOVERED — CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD/CONFIDENCE_MARGIN never directly asserted
Dual-gate exact boundary untested (reclassified from boundary to coverage)

finding_category.detail: 3 NPU→GPU cosmetic items in test_gpu_inference.py (docstrings + mock message)
Missing error code in fail-closed test, weak circuit breaker complementary negatives, untested PII patterns (CREDIT_CARD, HEX_SECRET)
TestConfidenceThresholdBehavior uses extreme values, not production defaults

finding_category.critical: Cross-service import: test_entrypoint.py line 17 imports from services.policy_agent.src.jwt_minter — maintenance coupling between PA and AO test suites

oracle_gates.gate: 6 h2 sections present: Coverage Map, Stale Test Inventory, Assertion Quality Findings, Boundary Violations, Prioritized Gap Report, Pre-existing Skip Analysis.
3 service headings (policy_agent, assistant_orchestrator, semantic_router) under each of 4 populated sections (12 total h3 headings + EA Index).
PGOV 0.85 at line 184 (Coverage Map). Dual-Gate at line 240 (Coverage Map). Neither appears under Boundary Violations.
git diff 6ab1ece --name-only returns exactly 2 files: docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md + docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md.
Tier 3 fail-safe: zero .py files in staged diff.

branch.name: feature/p5-task7-ea2-ao-sr-audit
branch.reason: Based on pre-EA-1-correction main (488b198). Content fully ported to corrected branch. Safe to delete after merge of correction branch.

sdo_action_items.action: Delete abandoned branch feature/p5-task7-ea2-ao-sr-audit after merge confirmation.
Update Vikunja task for Task 7 EA-2 with commit f25e170 and mark complete.
Scope Task 7 EA-3 (Prioritized Gap Report synthesis) or next task per roadmap.
